title: Vision Objects - Using Correlation Objects - Step 8: Make Adjustments to Properties and Test Again
description:
Vision Objects - Using Correlation Objects - Step 8: Make Adjustments to Properties and Test Again

Step 8: Make Adjustments to Properties and Test Again

After running the Correlation object a few times, you may have encountered problems with finding a Correlation or just want to fine tune some of the property settings.  Some common problems and fine tuning techniques are described in the next few sections.
